asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates the multi-agent diligence workflow, showing spreadsheet integration, research enrichment, and private/public agent states with live trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows spreadsheet, research, and copilot tabs clearly, though the interface is dense.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Walks through enrichment, multi-agent execution, and handoff stages.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark theme, but UI is crowded with multiple panels.

consistency.evidence: Includes spreadsheet, private/public agents, and room trace.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Real UI interactions and live trace updates are visible.

legibility.evidence: Small text in the trace and chat panels is hard to read without zooming.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly models a startup diligence workflow for finance/ops.

productionHonesty.evidence: Shows agent thinking states and manual handoff approvals.

observedEvidence: Copilot chat interface with public and private modes

defects.observed: The Room Trace panel text is very small and dense, making it difficult to read at standard README resolutions.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size of the trace panel or zoom in slightly during recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run multi-agent diligence workflows in NodeRoom, combining shared spreadsheets, automated research enrichment, and secure private drafting with human-in-the-loop handoffs.
